observation.en: His careful observation led to a discovery.
observation.zh: 他仔細的觀察帶來了一項發現。

obstacle.en: She overcame every obstacle in her path.
obstacle.zh: 她克服了路上的每個障礙。

obtain.en: He obtained a ticket for the concert.
obtain.zh: 他弄到了一張演唱會的票。

occasional.en: We take an occasional trip to the sea.

occupation.en: Please write your occupation on the form.
occupation.zh: 請在表格上寫下你的職業。

occupy.en: The big sofa occupies half the room.
occupy.zh: 那張大沙發佔了房間的一半。

offend.en: I'm sorry if my words offended you.
offend.zh: 如果我的話冒犯了你，我很抱歉。

offense.en: Driving too fast is a traffic offense.
offense.zh: 開太快是一種交通違規。

offensive.en: His offensive remark made her angry.

opera.en: We watched a famous opera last night.
opera.zh: 我們昨晚看了一齣著名的歌劇。

oppose.en: Many people opposed the new plan.
oppose.zh: 許多人反對這個新計畫。

option.en: You have two options to choose from.

orbit.en: The moon moves in orbit around the earth.

orchestra.en: The orchestra played a lovely song.
orchestra.zh: 管弦樂團演奏了一首優美的曲子。

orientation.en: New students attend an orientation day.
orientation.zh: 新生要參加新生訓練日。

orphan.en: The kind family adopted an orphan.
orphan.zh: 那個善良的家庭收養了一個孤兒。

otherwise.en: Hurry up; otherwise, we'll be late.
otherwise.zh: 快一點，不然我們會遲到。

outcome.en: We were happy with the outcome of the game.
outcome.zh: 我們對比賽的結果很滿意。

oval.en: The mirror has an oval shape.

overcoat.en: He wore a heavy overcoat in winter.
overcoat.zh: 冬天他穿著一件厚大衣。

overcome.en: She overcame her fear of swimming.
overcome.zh: 她克服了對游泳的恐懼。

overnight.en: We stayed overnight at a hotel.

overthrow.en: The people tried to overthrow the king.

oxygen.en: Plants give us oxygen to breathe.
oxygen.zh: 植物提供我們呼吸的氧氣。

pace.en: He walked at a slow pace.

panel.en: She pressed a button on the control panel.
panel.zh: 她按了控制面板上的一個按鈕。

parachute.en: He jumped from the plane with a parachute.
parachute.zh: 他帶著降落傘從飛機上跳下。

paragraph.en: Each paragraph has one main idea.

partial.en: We got a partial refund for the ticket.
partial.zh: 我們的票得到了部分退款。

participation.en: Your participation in class is important.
participation.zh: 你在課堂上的參與很重要。

partnership.en: The two companies formed a partnership.
partnership.zh: 這兩家公司結成了合作關係。

passive.en: He took a passive role in the group.
passive.zh: 他在團體裡採取被動的角色。

pasta.en: We had pasta with tomato sauce.
pasta.zh: 我們吃了番茄醬義大利麵。

paw.en: The cat hurt its front paw.

peculiar.en: The soup had a peculiar taste.

peer.en: Teens often listen to their peers.
peer.zh: 青少年常聽從同儕的意見。

penalty.en: The penalty for cheating is severe.

percent.en: Ninety percent of the class passed.
percent.zh: 班上百分之九十的人通過了。

percentage.en: A high percentage of students like sports.
percentage.zh: 高比例的學生喜歡運動。

perfection.en: She practices the piece to perfection.
perfection.zh: 她把這首曲子練到完美。

perfume.en: The flowers gave off a sweet perfume.
perfume.zh: 這些花散發出甜美的香氣。

permanent.en: They found a permanent home at last.
permanent.zh: 他們終於找到了永久的家。

persuasion.zh: 經過一番勸說，他同意了。

persuasive.en: Her speech was clear and persuasive.
persuasive.zh: 她的演講清楚又有說服力。

pessimistic.en: Don't be so pessimistic about the future.

pest.zh: 農夫保護作物不受害蟲侵害。

phenomenon.en: A rainbow is a natural phenomenon.

philosopher.zh: 這位哲學家提出深刻的問題。

philosophical.zh: 他們進行了一場哲學性的討論。

photography.zh: 攝影是她最喜歡的嗜好。

physical.en: Exercise keeps your physical health good.
physical.zh: 運動讓你的身體健康保持良好。

physician.en: The physician checked the patient's heart.
physician.zh: 醫生檢查了病人的心臟。

physicist.en: The physicist studied light and energy.
physicist.zh: 這位物理學家研究光與能量。

physics.en: We learned about gravity in physics.
physics.zh: 我們在物理課學了重力。

pickle.en: She added a pickle to the sandwich.
pickle.zh: 她在三明治裡加了一片醃黃瓜。

pioneer.en: She was a pioneer in computer science.

plentiful.en: Food was plentiful after the harvest.

plot.en: The plot of the movie was exciting.
plot.zh: 這部電影的情節很刺激。

plum.en: She picked a ripe plum from the tree.
plum.zh: 她從樹上摘了一顆熟李子。

plumber.en: The plumber fixed the leaking pipe.
plumber.zh: 水電工修好了漏水的管子。

polish.en: He polished his shoes until they shone.

popularity.zh: 這首歌很快變得受歡迎。

portable.en: She brought a portable speaker to the park.
portable.zh: 她帶了一個可攜式喇叭去公園。

portray.en: The actor portrayed a brave hero.
portray.zh: 這位演員飾演了一位勇敢的英雄。

possession.en: The old watch is her most valued possession.
possession.zh: 那只舊錶是她最珍視的所有物。

postage.en: The postage for the parcel was high.

potential.en: She has the potential to be a great singer.
potential.zh: 她有成為傑出歌手的潛力。

precise.en: Please give me the precise time.

predict.en: No one can predict the future.

prediction.en: His prediction about the game was right.
prediction.zh: 他對比賽的預測是對的。

pregnancy.en: She rested a lot during her pregnancy.

pregnant.en: My aunt is pregnant with twins.

presentation.en: She gave a clear presentation in class.
presentation.zh: 她在課堂上做了清楚的報告。

preservation.en: We support the preservation of forests.

preserve.en: Salt is used to preserve food.

prime.en: She is in the prime of her career.

priority.zh: 安全是我們的首要考量。

privacy.zh: 每個人都需要一些隱私。

privilege.en: It is a privilege to study here.
privilege.zh: 能在這裡讀書是一種榮幸。

proceed.en: Please proceed to the next room.

productive.en: I had a productive day at work.
productive.zh: 我工作上度過了很有效率的一天。

profession.zh: 教書是受人尊敬的職業。

professional.en: He is a professional basketball player.

promising.en: He is a promising young writer.
promising.zh: 他是個有前途的年輕作家。

promotion.en: She got a promotion at work.

prompt.en: Thank you for your prompt reply.

proposal.zh: 他們接受了他的商業提案。

prosper.zh: 這個小鎮開始繁榮起來。

prosperity.en: Everyone hopes for peace and prosperity.
prosperity.zh: 每個人都希望和平與繁榮。

prosperous.en: They live in a prosperous city.
prosperous.zh: 他們住在一座繁榮的城市。

protein.en: Eggs are a good source of protein.
protein.zh: 蛋是良好的蛋白質來源。

protest.en: People gathered to protest the new law.
protest.zh: 人們聚集起來抗議新法律。

psychological.zh: 壓力可能造成心理問題。

psychologist.en: The psychologist helped her with her fears.

psychology.zh: 她正在研究兒童心理學。

publicity.en: The movie got a lot of publicity.
publicity.zh: 這部電影得到很多宣傳。

publish.en: She will publish her first novel soon.
publish.zh: 她很快要出版她的第一本小說。

publisher.en: The publisher printed thousands of copies.

pursue.en: She decided to pursue her dream.

pursuit.en: He spends his life in the pursuit of knowledge.

quarrel.en: The two friends had a quarrel.

quilt.en: Grandma made a warm quilt for me.
quilt.zh: 奶奶為我做了一條溫暖的棉被。

quotation.en: He began his speech with a quotation.
quotation.zh: 他用一句名言開始他的演講。

radar.en: The ship was tracked by radar.

rage.en: He shook with rage at the unfair result.
rage.zh: 面對不公平的結果他氣得發抖。

rainfall.en: The rainfall this year was very low.

raisin.en: She added raisins to the bread.
raisin.zh: 她在麵包裡加了葡萄乾。

realistic.en: Set realistic goals you can reach.
realistic.zh: 訂定你能達成的實際目標。

rebel.en: The people rebelled against the unfair king.
rebel.zh: 人民反抗那個不公的國王。

reception.en: We waited at the hotel reception.

recipe.en: She followed a recipe to bake the cake.

recognition.en: She received recognition for her work.

recovery.en: His recovery from the illness was slow.
recovery.zh: 他從疾病中康復得很慢。

recreation.zh: 閱讀是一種放鬆的休閒活動。

reduction.en: There was a reduction in prices this week.

refer.en: Please refer to page ten for details.

reference.en: She used a book as a reference.

reflect.en: The calm lake reflected the mountains.

reflection.en: She saw her reflection in the window.
reflection.zh: 她在窗戶上看到自己的倒影。

reform.en: The school made reforms to improve teaching.
reform.zh: 學校進行改革以改善教學。

refugee.zh: 這個國家接納了許多難民。

refund.en: They gave me a refund for the broken toy.
refund.zh: 他們為壞掉的玩具退錢給我。

regarding.en: I have a question regarding the trip.
regarding.zh: 我有一個關於這趟旅行的問題。

register.en: Please register for the class online.

regulate.en: The law regulates how shops can sell.
regulate.zh: 法律規範商店的銷售方式。

regulation.en: We must follow the safety regulations.
regulation.zh: 我們必須遵守安全規定。

rejection.en: She handled the rejection with grace.

relaxation.en: A warm bath is good for relaxation.
relaxation.zh: 泡個溫水澡有助於放鬆。

reluctant.en: He was reluctant to ask for help.

remark.en: She made a kind remark about my work.
remark.zh: 她對我的作品做了親切的評論。

remedy.en: Honey is a home remedy for a sore throat.
remedy.zh: 蜂蜜是治喉嚨痛的偏方。

renew.en: I need to renew my library card.

representation.en: The map is a representation of the city.
representation.zh: 這張地圖是城市的呈現。

reputation.en: The restaurant has a good reputation.

rescue.zh: 消防員救出了被困的貓。

research.en: She does research on ocean animals.

researcher.zh: 這位研究員發表了她的研究結果。

reservation.en: I made a reservation for two.

resign.en: He decided to resign from his job.

resistance.zh: 這個計畫遭到強烈的抵抗。

resolution.en: My New Year's resolution is to exercise.
resolution.zh: 我的新年新希望是運動。

resolve.zh: 他們和平地解決了問題。

respectable.en: He is a respectable member of the community.
respectable.zh: 他是社區裡受人尊敬的一員。

respectful.en: She is always respectful to her elders.

restore.zh: 他們修復了那幅古老的畫。

restriction.en: There are restrictions on parking here.

retain.en: She managed to retain her calm.
